rationale: Keep: the two papers are tightly aligned in domain and outcome focus (both study B2B multichannel design/use and financial performance/profitability), and the citing paper’s stated gap on within-multichannel usage effects plausibly relies on the cited paper’s customer-level evidence on online/salesperson channel complementarities and profit effects. With a confirmed DOI match and this strong topical overlap, this does not look like an obvious incidental mention.
